about.label: About Us
about.title: Our Story
about.quote: We believe technology should simplify, not complicate. Every line of code we write has a purpose: to improve healthcare.
paragraphs: Doctore.ar was born in 2020, in the midst of a pandemic that accelerated the digital transformation of the healthcare sector. A group of developers and medical professionals came together with a clear vision: to create tools that truly solve the everyday problems of Argentine medical practices.

Since then, we have grown organically, listening to our users and constantly improving. TurnosMedicos, our flagship product, is the result of thousands of hours of development, testing and feedback from healthcare professionals.

Today we are a team of 25 people distributed throughout the country, united by the passion to modernize healthcare in Argentina. We work with individual practices, clinics and health centers of all specialties.
Our commitment is simple: develop accessible, secure and easy-to-use technology. Because when doctors can focus on what they do best, patients receive better care.
